# Go By Billy - LLMs.txt
# VIP Chauffeur & Airport Transfer Service | Essex, UK

## About
Go By Billy is a 5-star rated VIP chauffeur and airport transfer service based in Epping, Essex, UK.
Founded and operated by Bulent Ozel, with over 10 years of experience serving Essex and London.
65 verified Google reviews, all 5-star rated.

## Services
- Airport Transfers: Heathrow (£110), Gatwick (£140), Luton (£100), Stansted (£70)
- VIP Chauffeur Service
- Business & Corporate Transfers
- By The Hour: from £40/hr (our vehicle) or £35/hr (your vehicle)
- Group Travel: 7-seater executive vehicle available
- Long Distance: Southampton, Birmingham and beyond

## Coverage Areas
Epping, Chigwell, Loughton, Buckhurst Hill, Woodford, Chingford, Waltham Abbey,
Harlow, Brentwood, Chelmsford, Central London, all major London airports

## Contact
- Phone: +44 790 1756 001
- WhatsApp: +44 790 1756 001
- Website: https://gobybilly.co.uk
- Pre-booking only. Book at least 24 hours in advance.

## Key Facts
- Licensed private hire operator (Epping licence)
- Flight tracking included on all airport transfers
- Fixed prices, no hidden charges
- Executive Skoda Enyaq (7-seater)
- 16-seater minibus available on request
- Serves prominent and VIP clients
